rulings.Case Title: JEANETTE CARTER-DAWKINS VS. FREDERICK ROSS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Final Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 3, 2019 line 2. PLAINTIFF JEANETTE CARTER-DAWKINS Notice Of Motion And Motion For Final Judgment Hearing Required. Moving party to address payment to JTN Construction: (1) A payment in the amount of $12,197.33 is requested as a part of $116,255.92 expenses of sale. See Final Statement and Motion 4:23; and (2) A payment in the amount of $20,000 is requested as a part of $56,830.53 under reimbursement for distribution of the residue. See Carter-Dawkins Declaration, paragraph 6 ("Frederick Ross owes me $56,830.53 … it …included $20,0000 I paid to JTN Construction…") and Motion 5:21-22. Plaintiff to provide receipts for a total payment to JTN Construction in the amount of $32,197.33 no later than 9:00 a.m. on October 2, 2019. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: 108 ALBION STREET LLC VS. DAWN HAYES ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, UNLAWFUL DETAINER
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 3, 2019 line 4. DEFENDANT DAWN HAYES MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, UNLAWFUL DETAINER Hearing Required to address the definition of the term "vacate" within the meaning of the SFRO and what is the exact deadline for the payment (primarily for the purposes of strict compliance if such standard is applied). =(501/REQ)
